description: Personal Claude Code skills, published as installable plugins.
name: ira-claude-plugins

plugins.description: Vet a third-party agent artifact (skill, plugin, MCP server) before installing it locally.
plugins.name: test-before-install

plugins.description: Convert JSON command output to compact TOON notation before it enters the conversation, to save ingestion tokens.
plugins.name: json-to-toon

plugins.description: Debug with a written lab-notebook log of hypothesis, experiment, and result instead of ad hoc guessing.
plugins.name: debugging-with-the-scientific-method
